channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLpolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Democrats eye "hidden" Latino battlegrounds in 2026
item.description: The post-2024 narrative that Latino voters shifted right is facing its first real stress test â including in districts Republicans thought were safely...

item.title: Trump aims to defy gravity with Beijing friendship summit
item.description: President Trump's summit with Xi Jinping was staged as a reunion between old friends, concluding Friday with a private tour of Zhongnanhai, the Chinese...

item.title: Congressional leaders plead with their absentee lawmakers: "You've got to come"
item.description: Congressional leaders are straining to get their absentee members to return to Capitol Hill as the House's vote margins on major legislation grow ever...

item.title: AI writing hits a ceiling
item.description: Data: Graphite.io ; Note: Based on an average of three AI-detector tools sampling URLs from Common Crawl; Chart: Megan Morrone/Axios The flood of AI-generated...
